description: Generate AI videos on RunComfy via the `runcomfy` CLI — a smart router across the full video-model catalog: HappyHorse 1.0 (Arena #1, native in-pass audio), Wan-AI Wan 2-7 (open weights, audio-driven lip-sync), ByteDance Seedance v2 / 1-5 / 1-0 (multi-modal cinematic), Kling 3.0 / 2-6, Google Veo 3-1, MiniMax Hailuo 2-3, ByteDance Dreamina 3-0. Covers text-to-video (t2v), image-to-video (i2v), and Veo's video-extend endpoint. The skill picks the right model for the user's intent (Arena-#1 quality, multi-shot character identity, in-pass audio, cinematic motion, fastest path, sub-15s clip, longest duration) and ships each model's documented prompting patterns plus the minimal `runcomfy run` invoke. Triggers on "generate video", "make a video", "text to video", "t2v", "image to video", "i2v", "animate", "AI video", "make X move", "video from prompt", "video from image", or any explicit ask to produce a video clip from prompt or still.
representativeQueries: Make an AI video from prompt
I want to animate this image
